title: Inscription On A Goblet.
content:
There's death in the cup, sae beware!
            Nay, more, there is danger in touching;
        But wha can avoid the fell snare?
            The man and his wine's sae bewitching!
meaning:
This evocative piece by Robert Burns, titled "Inscription On A Goblet.", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
